rationale: In the citing paper, Okada (2005) appears only as part of a grouped citation to prior work showing that justifications can excuse indulgence/self-control lapses. The paper does not discuss Okada's specific findings, methods, or boundary conditions, and it does not build any hypothesis or empirical test directly on that study. Functionally, this is a background positioning citation within a broader justification literature list rather than a distinct conceptual dependency.
